title: Wholesome Vietnamese Rice Bake
description: A comforting rice bake that blends jasmine rice, low-sodium fish sauce, brown rice syrup, and tender shredded chicken into a sweet and savory dish perfect for a date night.

ingredients.name: jasmine rice
ingredients.notes: cook according to package and fluff with fork

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the cooked rice, shredded chicken, diced carrots, sliced green onions, minced garlic, and grated ginger.
Pour the low-sodium chicken broth into the mixture and stir until the rice is evenly moistened.
Add the brown rice syrup, low-sodium fish sauce, and lime juice, mixing thoroughly to distribute the flavors.
Taste and season with a pinch of salt if needed, then transfer the mixture to a greased baking dish.
Cover the dish with foil and bake for 20 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Remove the foil, sprinkle toasted sesame seeds over the top, and bake uncovered for an additional 10 minutes until the top is lightly browned.
Let the bake rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with extra green onions or lime wedges if desired.
Serve warm as a satisfying dinner for two or a small family.
